message:
docs(readme): fix non-existent dropna_with_thresh API name (br-dsnz4 / fd90.104)

fd90.104: line 975 in the Missing Data Handling section called
'df.dropna_with_thresh(3)?' but no such function exists. The actual
declaration at crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:16546 is
'pub fn dropna_with_threshold(...)' (with the full 'old' suffix).

A user copy-pasting the example would hit:
  error[E0599]: no method named `dropna_with_thresh` found for
                struct `DataFrame`

Verified the surrounding examples use real APIs:
- fillna, ffill, bfill, interpolate, fillna_method
- dropna, dropna_with_options, dropna_columns

Fix: dropna_with_thresh → dropna_with_threshold. Pure README change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
